stem: In a figure, lines u and v are parallel and are cut by a transversal. One interior angle between the parallel lines has measure 105 degrees. On the opposite side of the transversal, a marked interior angle has measure x degrees, where the angle vertical to it lies on the same side of the transversal as the 105-degree angle. What is the value of x?
rationale: The correct answer is 75. The 105-degree angle and the angle vertical to the x-degree angle are same-side interior angles between parallel lines, so they are supplementary: x + 105 = 180, giving x = 75.
